name: Don Grolnick
description: '''Don Grolnick''' (September 23, 1947 – June 1, 1996) was an American [[jazz]] pianist, composer, and record producer. He was a member of the groups [[Steps Ahead]] and [[Dreams (band)|Dreams]], both with [[Michael Brecker]], and played often with the [[Brecker Brothers]]. As a session musician, he recorded with [[John Scofield]], [[Billy Cobham]], [[Roberta Flack]], [[Harry Chapin]], [[Dave Holland (bassist)|Dave Holland]], [[Chuck Mangione]], [[Bette Midler]], [[Marcus Miller]], [[Bob Mintzer]], [[Linda Ronstadt]], [[David Sanborn]], [[Carly Simon]], [[Barry Manilow]], [[JD Souther]], [[Steely Dan]], and [[James Taylor]].
